NPC_REPLACER.Title: NPC Token Replacer
NPC_REPLACER.DialogTimeout: Preview dialog timed out. Please try again.
NPC_REPLACER.AlreadyProcessing: Token replacement is already in progress, please wait.
NPC_REPLACER.NoTokens: No NPC tokens found in the current scene
NPC_REPLACER.NoSelectedNPCs: No NPC tokens in selection (select NPC tokens or deselect all to process entire scene)
NPC_REPLACER.DeleteFailedCount: {count} token(s) replaced but old token could not be removed — duplicates may exist
NPC_REPLACER.SummaryPartialFailure: Replacement completed with issues: {replaced} replaced, {noMatch} not found, {importFailed} import failures, {creationFailed} creation failures
NPC_REPLACER.ErrorSettingsRetrieve: Failed to read compendium settings. Using default compendiums.
NPC_REPLACER.ErrorSettingsParse: Compendium settings are corrupted. Using default compendiums.
NPC_REPLACER.ErrorIndexLoad: Failed to load monster index. Token replacement may not work correctly.
NPC_REPLACER.ErrorInitFailed: NPC Token Replacer failed to initialize. Check the browser console for details.
NPC_REPLACER.ErrorFolderCreate: Failed to create import folder. Actors will be imported to root.
NPC_REPLACER.WildcardFallback: No token art variants found for "{name}" — using placeholder icon.
NPC_REPLACER.NoModule: No official D&D compendiums found. Install official D&D content (Monster Manual, Adventures, etc.)
NPC_REPLACER.NoCompendium: No compendiums available for token replacement
NPC_REPLACER.IndexEmpty: Monster index is empty — compendiums may have failed to load. Check the console for details.
NPC_REPLACER.GMOnly: Only the GM can replace tokens
NPC_REPLACER.ConfirmContent: The following {count} NPC tokens will be replaced with official D&D versions:

VariationMode.Name: Token Variation Mode
VariationMode.Hint: How to select token art when multiple variations are available for a creature.

EnabledCompendiums.Name: Enabled Compendiums
EnabledCompendiums.Hint: Which compendiums to use for finding creature tokens.

CompendiumSelector.Name: Select Compendiums
CompendiumSelector.Label: Configure Compendiums
CompendiumSelector.Hint: Choose which official D&D compendiums to search for creature tokens.
CompendiumSelector.Title: Compendium Selection
CompendiumSelector.ModeDefaultHint: Use only SRD, Tasha's Cauldron, Monster Manual, PHB, and DMG. Best for standard games.
CompendiumSelector.ModeAllHint: Use all installed official D&D compendiums including adventures and expansions.
CompendiumSelector.ModeCustomHint: Manually select which compendiums to use from the list below.
CompendiumSelector.Saved: Compendium settings saved. The index will be reloaded on next use.
CompendiumSelector.SaveError: Failed to save compendium settings. Please try again.

DialogTimeout.Name: Preview Dialog Timeout (minutes)
DialogTimeout.Hint: How long to wait before auto-closing the preview dialog. Increase for large scenes or slow review.

HttpTimeout.Name: HTTP Timeout (seconds)
HttpTimeout.Hint: Timeout for network requests when resolving wildcard token paths. Increase for slow connections.
